goal: Adapt Planet Wars / Halite-style 4P heuristics to Orbit Wars without directly copying external code.
main_idea: Keep the current sample/domain planner, then add 4P shape control: prefer outer planets, penalize center fights, and reduce attacks into enemy pressure.
borrowed_concepts: Halite II style outer control in 4P
implementation_notes: Adds _apply_halite_4p_shape_adjustment after existing candidate scoring layers.
No external source code is copied; ideas are reimplemented in the local tensor planner.
This is a research branch, not yet a stable submission candidate.
